Vocabulary - उदारमनस्कता | Story 20

24 May 2021 | Sanskrit Sanskrit-Stories Sanskrit-Vocabulary

Image from Telegram Channel - kathaaH कथाः

Meanings from - Learnsanskrit.cc

Sanskrit Word English Meaning
कः who / what
नितराम् wholly / by all means
अनयोः of these two
तावता to that extent / in the mean time
अवनमय्य bowed down
अर्हति deserve

Few Sankrit Sentences

Sanskrit Sentence English Meaning
सः कः? Who is he?
अहं कः ? who am I ?
कः त्वम् ? Who are you?
कः तत्र? Who is there?
कः वदति ? Who is speaking ?

Note - All meanings are from the above mentioned website. If there is any mistake, do inform.
